ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_barcode" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient at diagnosis */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient */,
  "vital_status" TEXT /* Current vital status of the patient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient */,
  "karnofsky_performance_score" INTEGER /* Karnofsky Performance Score */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the patient */,
  "insurance_status" TEXT /* Insurance status of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_barcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumors" (
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tumor record */,
  "patient_barcode" TEXT /* Reference to the patient's barcode */,
  "tumor_tissue_site" TEXT /* Anatomical site where the tumor is located */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tumor at diagnosis */,
  "acronym" TEXT /* Acronym for the tumor type */,
  "histological_type" TEXT /* Histological type of the tumor */,
  "histological_grade" TEXT /* Histological grade of the tumor */,
  "lymph_nodes_involved" INTEGER /* Number of lymph nodes involved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tumor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tumors_patient_barcode FOREIGN KEY ("patient_barcode") REFERENCES patients ("patient_barcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_barcode" TEXT /* Reference to the patient's barcode */,
  "tobacco_smoking_history" TEXT /* History of tobacco smoking */,
  "radiation_therapy" TEXT /* History of radiation therapy */,
  "chemotherapy" TEXT /* History of chemotherapy */,
  "hormone_therapy" TEXT /* History of hormone therapy */,
  "family_cancer_history" TEXT /* Family history of cancer */,
  "comorbidities" TEXT /* Comorbidities (e.g., diabetes, hypertension) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_barcode FOREIGN KEY ("patient_barcode") REFERENCES patients ("patient_barcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome record */,
  "patient_barcode" TEXT /* Reference to the patient's barcode */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded outcome */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment outcome */,
  "follow_up_interval" INTEGER /* Interval in days since the last follow-up */,
  "response_to_treatment" TEXT /* Response to treatment (e.g., complete response, partial response) */,
  "progression_free_survival" INTEGER /* Progression-free survival in months */,
  "overall_survival" INTEGER /* Overall survival in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_patient_barcode FOREIGN KEY ("patient_barcode") REFERENCES patients ("patient_barcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., data analyst, oncologist) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher (e.g., oncology, radiology) */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the researcher (e.g., medical oncology, surgical oncology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_institution FOREIGN KEY ("institution") REFERENCES institutions ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_barcode" TEXT /* Reference to the patient's barcode */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher's ID */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_elements_accessed" TEXT /* Specific data elements accessed (e.g., tumor characteristics, treatment outcomes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_patient_barcode FOREIGN KEY ("patient_barcode") REFERENCES patients ("patient_barcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., hospital, research center) */,
  "affiliations" TEXT /* Affiliations of the institution (e.g., academic, government) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the research study */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution conducting the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the research study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study ID */,
  "patient_barcode" TEXT /* Reference to the patient's barcode */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date of informed consent */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date of withdrawal (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_patient_barcode FOREIGN KEY ("patient_barcode") REFERENCES patients ("patient_barcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing agreement */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution ID */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study ID */,
  "data_elements_shared" TEXT /* Data elements shared (e.g., tumor characteristics, treatment outcomes) */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date of data sharing */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date of data sharing expiration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)
